creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Channel strategy reference (no action needed, FYI)

  • Google Ads and LSAs are the primary revenue channel for Quality HVAC. Keep budget focus and optimization effort here.
  • Meta is supplementary (awareness and retargeting only).
  • Don't dilute Google budget to fund Meta. If Google performance dips, fix Google before reallocating.
  • High intent demand capture is what's been working in HVAC historically. Don't break what works.

@Ads Team

body:
Salam,

  • Financing page is on HOLD. Do not start building.
  • Blocked on Nate. Two pieces needed before unblock:
    • Compliant verbiage from Nate's Wells Fargo rep.
    • The correct Apply Now link tied to the new qualityhvac365.com domain.
  • Action item for Naz: follow up with Nate via WhatsApp this week.
  • Once verbiage and link are in hand, Naz unblocks and reassigns to Hashir and Zayan.

@Nacer Amrouch @Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz

creator: Sohib Boundaoui
body:
Automation Checklist

Calendly:

  • Booking confirmation email
  • 24-hour reminder email
  • Auto-generated meeting link

Perspective:

  • Post-submission email: Sarah's bio + what to expect on the consultation

RingRx (SMS):

  • 10-min post-submission SMS: "Looking forward to our call! If you have any questions, text us here. — Vous Physique team"﻿
  • 1-hour before meeting SMS reminder with Zoom link
  • No-show SMS (Lead marked "No-Show"): reschedule link

GoHighLevel:

  • Lead type by Q1 persona (hormonal / PCOS / general / exploring) for segmentation
